_notes: This is NOT a runnable workflow — it shows which fields to replace with __PLACEHOLDER__ markers.
Export your real workflow from ComfyUI (Save → Save API Format), then replace the values below.
- LoadImage node for scene:  set 'image' to '__INPUT_IMAGE__'
- LoadImage node for mask:   set 'image' to '__MASK_IMAGE__'  (white = region to fill)
The mask uploaded by BboxScaleAugmentor is a white-on-black PNG where white marks
the original bbox area (the hole to fill).  Make sure your inpainting model uses
the same convention — or invert the mask node in ComfyUI if needed.
Tip: keep the positive prompt generic, e.g. 'background, seamless, high quality',
so the model fills the hole with plausible background content.
